context: Checks whether the agent reasons precisely about native-image closed-world reachability, resources, and build-time versus runtime initialization.

checklist.name: Dynamic reachability diagnosed
checklist.description: Identifies Class.forName/config-driven type loading as a closed-world reachability problem and traces the exact serializer contract.

checklist.name: Targeted reflection or factory design
checklist.description: Proposes precise registration of required constructors/methods or an explicit build-visible provider/factory registry, not package-wide reflection.

checklist.name: Resource inclusion
checklist.description: Adds only the required template/resource pattern and verifies classloader lookup and encoding.

checklist.name: Static initialization semantics
checklist.description: Separates image-build initialization from process runtime and protects fresh STARTED/NONCE semantics with an appropriate runtime initialization/lifecycle design.

checklist.name: Secret handling
checklist.description: Prevents build-time capture or embedding of API_TOKEN and validates runtime configuration/secret availability without logging it.

checklist.name: No broad registrations
checklist.description: Rejects whole-package reflection and all-resource inclusion unless a quantified compatibility need remains.

checklist.name: JVM versus native contracts
checklist.description: Keeps a JVM baseline and explicitly compares serializer loading, resource content, nonce freshness, start time, and token sourcing in native mode.

checklist.name: Native verification
checklist.description: Names a packaged native build and native integration test or production-equivalent launch with failure-path coverage.

checklist.name: Staged scope
checklist.description: Implements independent, reviewable reachability/resource/init fixes with rollback and residual-risk notes.
